# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

actions:
  1:
    action: snapshot
    description: >-
      Snapshot indices to 'my_s3_repository'. Retain backups for 30 days
    options:
      repository: my_s3_repository
      # All indices
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: false
      partial: false
      wait_for_completion: true
      timeout_override: 7200
      skip_repo_fs_check: false
      name: '<snapshot_{now/d}>'
      maximum_wait: 3600
      disable_action: false
    filters:
    - filtertype: age
      source: name
      direction: older
      timestring: '%Y.%m.%d'
      unit: days
      unit_count: 30
      field: epoch
      stats_result: min_value

  2:
    action: delete_snapshots
    description: >-
      Delete snapshots from 'my_s3_repository' older than 30 days (based on name), for 'snapshot_*' prefix
    options:
      repository: my_s3_repository
      timeout_override: 3600
      retry_interval: 120
      retry_count: 3
      disable_action: false
    filters:
    - filtertype: age
      source: name
      direction: older
      timestring: '%Y.%m.%d'
      unit: days
      unit_count: 30
      field: epoch
      stats_result: min_value
